text.title: OpenAI API Integration — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output code.

list.item: Input: Task complexity description, latency target, monthly budget.
Action: Run the model-selection rubric — start at gpt-4o-mini.
Output: config.openai_model + projected monthly cost.
Decision gate: If projected cost > budget, downscale model or drop scope.
Input: OPENAI_API_KEY in env.
Action: Initialise OpenAI client once at module level; expose via dependency injection.
Output: Singleton `client` instance.
Decision gate: If multi-tenant, prefer per-request key resolution.
Input: Task description.
Action: Author Pydantic schema; pass it as `response_format` (or parse JSON mode response into it).
Output: models.py with TaskResponse class.
Decision gate: If output is genuinely freeform, document it and skip structured output.
Input: tenacity, logger, cost tracker.
Action: Wrap the call site in retry + log (model, tokens, $cost) on every response.
Output: Telemetry rows visible in Langfuse / OTEL / logs.
Decision gate: If retries thrash > 30% of calls, you are hitting org-tier rate limit — request quota bump.
Input: Eval prompts + expected outputs.
Action: Run 20-prompt smoke test, diff against fixture, then deploy behind feature flag.
Output: smoke-test.json passes; flag flipped progressively.
Decision gate: If smoke-test fails on critical prompts, reopen step 3 (schema) or step 1 (model).
